pick_factor.title: Choose Verification Method
pick_factor.description: Pick how Arlo should verify this device. The list reflects the second-factor options on your Arlo account.

push_approval.title: Approve Push Notification
push_approval.description: A push notification has been sent to your phone. Open the Arlo app, approve it, then click Submit below.

otp_entry.title: Enter Verification Code
otp_entry.description: Arlo sent a one-time code to {destination}. Enter it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Arlo
reauth_confirm.description: The trust cookie for {username} has expired. Click Submit to start a fresh verification.

reauth_password.title: Password Required
reauth_password.description: Stored password for {username} was rejected by Arlo. Enter the current password.

reauth_pick_factor.title: Choose Verification Method
reauth_pick_factor.description: Pick how Arlo should verify this device.

reauth_push.title: Approve Push Notification
reauth_push.description: A push notification has been sent to your phone. Open the Arlo app, approve it, then click Submit below.

reauth_otp.title: Enter Verification Code
reauth_otp.description: Arlo sent a one-time code to {destination}. Enter it below.

media_storage.title: Media Storage
media_storage.description: Choose where to save motion clips and snapshots. Select 'Disabled' for no archival.

error.invalid_otp: Verification code rejected. Check the code from your email/SMS and try again, or restart the integration setup if it has expired.
error.push_pending: Push not approved yet. Approve it in the Arlo app, then click Submit again.
error.push_timeout: Verification expired or failed. Restart the flow.
error.rate_limited: Arlo is rate-limiting requests. Wait a few hours and try again.

abort.rate_limited: Arlo is rate-limiting requests. Wait a few hours and try again.
abort.push_timeout: Verification expired. Restart the integration to try again.

data_description.ffmpeg_stream: Leave off unless the live view is black. Off (default) lets go2rtc read the camera directly — smoother, no transcoding. Turn on only if the stream never appears; it routes video through ffmpeg to work around go2rtc builds that can't read Arlo's stream, at the cost of some smoothness.

snapshot.name: Take snapshot
snapshot.description: Request a fresh full-frame snapshot. Arrives asynchronously via MQTT and refreshes the camera tile.
